task: Upgrade nanobot knowledge management into a persistent wiki workflow

features.description: Capture harness baseline for the knowledge wiki rollout
steps: Confirm current repo status and test baseline
Record initial implementation scope and constraints

features.description: Fix the pre-existing GitStore init failure in the local environment
steps: Reproduce tests/agent/test_git_store.py::TestInit::test_init_creates_git_dir
Make GitStore work without assuming dulwich is installed

features.description: Re-run targeted GitStore tests after the baseline fix
steps: Run tests/agent/test_git_store.py
Confirm init, log, diff, and revert behaviors still pass
Introduce knowledge.enabled, knowledge.dir, knowledge.searchBackend, knowledge.maxPagesPerQuery, knowledge.autoFileAnswers
Keep existing memory config semantics unchanged
Add package entrypoints under nanobot/knowledge
Keep the implementation separate from memory and Dream
Represent page metadata, source material, search hits, answer results, and lint findings
Make page metadata compatible with YAML frontmatter
Ensure knowledge/raw, knowledge/wiki/sources, knowledge/wiki/topics, knowledge/wiki/entities, knowledge/wiki/syntheses exist
Initialize knowledge/index.md, knowledge/log.md, knowledge/SCHEMA.md when needed
Create initial SCHEMA.md template
Create initial index.md and log.md templates
Write pages with type, title, aliases, source_ids, updated_at, links_out
Parse the same frontmatter back into typed metadata
Normalize titles into stable slugs
Avoid collisions for repeated titles
Persist ingested local files or fetched URL content under knowledge/raw
Treat the stored raw payload as immutable after ingest

features.description: Implement URL source fetching for kb ingest
steps: Fetch readable text from http or https URLs
Preserve source origin and final title for wiki compilation

features.description: Implement local file source loading for kb ingest
steps: Read markdown, text, json, and similar file types safely
Capture source title and content without mutating the original file
Compile one source into summary, topics, entities, key claims, contradictions, and superseded source ids
Parse model output into structured data

features.description: Make the compiler resilient to malformed JSON output
steps: Use tolerant JSON repair
Validate missing or malformed fields with safe defaults
Create pages under knowledge/wiki/sources
Include summary, key claims, conflicts, and raw-source references
Create or update topic pages under knowledge/wiki/topics
Append new synthesized updates and related source ids
Create or update entity pages under knowledge/wiki/entities
Track aliases and related source ids
Populate links_out in frontmatter
Emit inline links between source, topic, and entity pages where possible
List pages by category with one-line summaries
Keep source, topic, entity, and synthesis sections current
Record ingest timestamp, source id, and touched pages
Keep the log append-only

features.description: Implement knowledge search over wiki pages
steps: Search index and page content with a grep-style local strategy
Return ranked hits capped by knowledge.maxPagesPerQuery
Use index.md to shortlist candidate pages
Read only the top relevant wiki pages for answering

features.description: Build an ask prompt from retrieved wiki pages
steps: Construct provider input from question plus page excerpts
Keep knowledge out of the normal agent system prompt
Produce a final answer using retrieved wiki pages
Return page-level and source-level citations in the answer

features.description: Support kb ask fallback without provider output
steps: Return a deterministic extractive response when model synthesis fails
Still include citations to retrieved pages
Record question text, selected pages, and whether an answer was filed
Preserve append-only ordering
Create pages under knowledge/wiki/syntheses when --save is used
Record citations and supporting page ids in the saved answer
Do not auto-file answers when the config flag is false
Auto-file only when save is requested or the config flag is true
Detect wiki pages with no inbound links
Return machine-readable findings and human-readable summaries
Detect one-way links that should have reciprocal references
Report the page pair for follow-up
Detect newer sources that supersede earlier source ids
Warn when the older page is not explicitly marked as superseded
Detect conflict markers in pages
Report them so the operator can investigate
Record lint timestamp and finding counts
Keep lint history alongside ingest and query history
Show whether knowledge is enabled
Report source, page, synthesis, and lint counts
Read memory/MEMORY.md without modifying it
Create knowledge/wiki/topics/project-context.md from project context content
Update the project-context topic page instead of duplicating it
Append a single log entry for each import run

features.description: Expose a kb Typer subcommand group
steps: Register nanobot kb ... under the main CLI
Keep help text consistent with existing command groups
Accept a path or URL argument
Run the ingest workflow and print touched pages
Accept a question plus optional --save
Print the synthesized answer and cited pages
Run lint checks
Print findings and a success message when clean
Show knowledge directory paths and counts
Avoid mutating the workspace during status checks
Expose the memory bridge operation
Report the created or updated page path

features.description: Keep ContextBuilder free of full knowledge wiki injection
steps: Do not add knowledge/wiki content to build_system_prompt
Preserve the existing memory-only prompt behavior

features.description: Retire the obsolete legacy dream module
steps: Delete or otherwise remove the unused nanobot/agent/dream.py path
Leave the active Dream implementation in nanobot/agent/memory.py untouched

features.description: Stop presenting MemOS as the primary knowledge path
steps: Keep memory.memos optional for memory facts only
Do not wire knowledge wiki behavior through MemOS

features.description: Add unit tests for frontmatter and page serialization
steps: Verify metadata fields round-trip correctly
Verify links_out and source_ids survive reloads

features.description: Add unit tests for kb ingest
steps: Verify raw source immutability and file creation
Verify index and log updates after ingest

features.description: Add unit tests for kb ask search and answer routing
steps: Verify index-first retrieval behavior
Verify citations are included in answers

features.description: Add unit tests for kb lint
steps: Verify orphan, backlink, superseded, and conflict findings
Verify clean states return no findings

features.description: Add integration tests for the full knowledge workflow
steps: Ingest complementary sources, ask a cross-source question, save the answer, then lint
Verify the wiki stays coherent after the full flow

features.description: Add CLI tests for kb subcommands
steps: Cover kb ingest, ask, lint, status, and import-memory
Keep tests isolated with temporary workspaces

features.description: Document the new knowledge wiki workflow
steps: Update README and/or dedicated docs to explain knowledge vs memory
Document the kb commands and workspace structure

features.description: Run targeted verification for the completed rollout
steps: Run knowledge tests and relevant CLI tests
Re-check memory and Dream regressions that overlap the touched code
Update PLAN.json passes and append PROGRESS.md entries
Create delivery commits with the required Codex trailer
